children.innerHTML:
Hi, I'm Maya — I design
products people keep
coming back to.
Independent product designer and design engineer with ten years helping startups turn rough ideas into things worth using. Currently taking on a couple of projects for late 2026.

meta_description: Maya Reyes — independent product designer & design engineer.
name: folio_home
page_data_script:
data.projects = [{'title': 'Orbit — habit tracker', 'tags': 'Product design · iOS', 'year': '2026', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512941937669-90a1b58e7e9c?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1100', 'url': '/work'}, {'title': 'Maroot — plant delivery', 'tags': 'Brand · Web', 'year': '2025', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1466692476868-aef1dfb1e735?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1100', 'url': '/work'}, {'title': 'Sonic — music for focus', 'tags': 'Product · Motion', 'year': '2025', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511671782779-c97d3d27a1d4?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1100', 'url': '/work'}, {'title': 'Atlas — travel journal', 'tags': 'Brand · App', 'year': '2024', 'image': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1469854523086-cc02fe5d8800?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1100', 'url': '/work'}]
data.services = [{'no': '01', 'title': 'Product design', 'desc': 'End-to-end UX and UI for apps and platforms — from messy first sketch to a polished, shippable system.'}, {'no': '02', 'title': 'Brand identity', 'desc': 'Names, logos, type and the rules that keep it all consistent as you grow.'}, {'no': '03', 'title': 'Design engineering', 'desc': 'I build what I design — production front-end in Vue or React, animation included.'}]
data.testimonials = [{'quote': 'Maya turned a vague idea into a product we were proud to launch. She thinks like a founder and draws like a dream.', 'name': 'Sam Okonkwo', 'role': 'Founder, Orbit'}, {'quote': "The fastest, clearest design partner I've worked with. Everything shipped on time and looked better than the pitch.", 'name': 'Lena Park', 'role': 'CEO, Maroot'}]
